title: Ubiquiti Wave-Nano, UISP Wave Nano
description: Wave-Nano is a 60 GHz point-to-multipoint (PtMP) client device with built-in 5 GHz backup (WiFi 6 - 802.11ax) from Ubiquiti with a range up to 5 km+ and is ideal for ISPs. The very compact and durable device is also equipped with integrated GPS , Bluetooth for simple initial setup from a mobile via the UISP mobile application and a Gigabit LAN port with PoE support. The device supports both bridge and NAT mode and supports 1080 and 2160MHz channel width in the 60GHz spectrum. The maximum… Compact dimensions - 257 Ã 257 Ã 114 mm 60GHz spectrum with low interference - 57 to 71 GHz Range up to 5 km+ - depends on the regulation in the country used 2Gbps Throughput (1 Gbps FD) Supports half channel width to achieve longer distance or better availability in bad weather Supported channels: 58320, 59400, 60480, 61560, 62640, 63720, 64800, 65880, 66960, 68040, 69200, 70200 MHz - depends on the place of use Gigabit LAN port with passive PoE support (24 or 48V DC) Built-in GPS Settings via web management and bluetooth - UISP mobile application Device Fine Tuning Holder PoE power adapter 48 V/0.65 A Power cord
